asset_name: Epitalon Telomerase and Telomere Mechanistic Evidence
status: PRIMARY IN-VITRO PUBLICATION IDENTITIES CONFIRMED — FULL METHODS EXTRACTION OPEN
domain: Human somatic cell telomerase and proliferative-limit experiments
extracted_summary: Primary in-vitro publications report telomerase, telomere and proliferative-limit experiments in human somatic cell systems.
These are cell-culture findings, not human longevity trials.
limitations: Full methods, assay controls and replication remain open.
Cell-line telomere changes do not prove healthy lifespan extension.
permitted_claims: Epitalon has in-vitro human somatic-cell telomere and telomerase research.
prohibited_claims: Claims that Epitalon extends human lifespan.
Claims that telomerase activation is necessarily safe.
